text: Rewrite the following in plain language and keep all meaning intact: The repository now emits a layered JSON report with trace metrics and self-audit summaries.
Summarize the key change in two sentences: the system now compares clean, project-out, and restored conditions for the same prompt file.
Turn this into a bullet list of exactly three items: The harness loads prompts, runs condition sweeps, and writes a structured report.
Extract the main tradeoff from this sentence: projection ablation may reduce refusal behavior, but it can also increase drift away from the clean distribution.
Given the sentence 'The model refused instead of following the governing file', produce a concise diagnosis and one corrective suggestion.
Explain the purpose of a JSON schema to a non-technical reader in under 80 words.
Convert this to title case: gemma self study harness with trace metrics and self audit
Provide a short release note for a feature that adds file-backed prompt evaluation and trace summaries.
List two reasons a clean baseline matters when evaluating a steering intervention.
Write a concise commit message for a change that adds a CLI command named gemma-study.
